summary: Remember Me Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: 7/7 tests passed. The Remember Me toggle on login page works correctly - checked (default) sets 7-day persistent cookie with Max-Age, unchecked sets session-only cookie without Max-Age.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.ts line 155: rememberMe defaults to true when not provided - correct
Backend auth.ts line 203: JWT expiry is '7d' when rememberMe=true, '24h' when rememberMe=false - correct
Backend auth.ts line 220: Cookie uses spread operator ...(rememberMe && { maxAge: ... }) to conditionally add maxAge - correct implementation
Frontend Login.tsx line 11: rememberMe state defaults to true - correct
Frontend Login.tsx line 117-127: Checkbox with data-testid='remember-me-checkbox' - correct
Frontend api.ts line 60: login type includes rememberMe?: boolean - correct
Frontend Signup.tsx line 60: Auto-login after signup passes rememberMe: true - correct
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remember Me feature is fully functional. Backend needed a restart to pick up the changes (hot reload may not have worked). Cookie name is 'auth_token'. When rememberMe=true: Max-Age=604800 (7 days). When rememberMe=false: no Max-Age (session cookie). JWT expiry also differs: 7d vs 24h.

Backend_RememberMe_True_Persistent_Cooki.details: POST /api/auth/login with rememberMe=true sets cookie with Max-Age=604800 (7 days)

Backend_RememberMe_False_Session_Cookie.details: POST /api/auth/login with rememberMe=false sets session cookie (no Max-Age/Expires)

Backend_Default_RememberMe_True.details: POST /api/auth/login without rememberMe param defaults to rememberMe=true (7-day cookie)

Backend_JWT_Expiry_Differs.details: JWT expiry is 7d when rememberMe=true, 24h when rememberMe=false

Backend_Session_Cookie_Auth_Works.details: Session cookie (rememberMe=false) successfully authenticates requests to /api/auth/me

Backend_Persistent_Cookie_Auth_Works.details: Persistent cookie (rememberMe=true) successfully authenticates requests to /api/auth/me

Backend_Cookie_HttpOnly_Attribute.details: Cookie has HttpOnly attribute for both rememberMe=true and rememberMe=false

Backend_Cookie_SameSite_Attribute.details: Cookie has SameSite=Lax attribute for both rememberMe=true and rememberMe=false

Backend_Cookie_Path_Attribute.details: Cookie has Path=/ attribute for both rememberMe=true and rememberMe=false

Frontend_Login_Page_Renders.details: Login page renders with email, password fields and Remember Me checkbox

Frontend_Checkbox_Found.details: Remember Me checkbox found with data-testid='remember-me-checkbox'

Frontend_Checkbox_Default_Checked.details: Remember Me checkbox is checked by default

Frontend_Login_With_Checkbox_Checked.details: Login with checkbox checked navigates to dashboard

Frontend_Logout_Works.details: Logout button works and redirects to login page

Frontend_Checkbox_Can_Be_Unchecked.details: Remember Me checkbox can be unchecked by clicking

Frontend_Login_With_Checkbox_Unchecked.details: Login with checkbox unchecked navigates to dashboard (session cookie works)
